scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/backend && npm run lint -w packages/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/backend && npm run typecheck -w packages/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/backend && npm run test -w packages/frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
